description:
Shift delegated execution from launch-only behavior to a real orchestrator-owned lifecycle. This epic covers the gap where workers can finish work in a worktree but the parent/orchestrator does not reliably validate, land, acknowledge, and clean up the result.

Existing related tickets already in flight:
- sbdpi-swx.5 delegated worker completion usability
- sbdpi-swx.2 landing verification improvements

This epic adds the missing end-to-end orchestration needed to make delegated work remotely usable for a human operator.
title: Make delegated worker lifecycle and landing orchestrator-owned
